mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 240 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signals robust supply-side expansion, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window where both INDPRO and HOUST show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A labor market tightening indicated by declining unemployment (UNRATE) and rising payroll employment (PAYEMS) creates wage pressures that force central banks to raise rates, causing negative S&P 500 returns during late-cycle regimes.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where both UNRATE < 5.0 and PAYEMS > 144,747.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer demand, as measured by real sales (RSAFS), correlates with stronger corporate revenues, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through improved earnings expectations.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns remain negative in > 40% of periods when RSAFS shows positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1) signals weakening economic fundamentals, reducing corporate profitability and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns remain positive in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 shows negative growth.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) combined with declining housing starts (HOUST) indicates supply-side bottlenecks, creating inflationary pressures that push rates higher and lower equity valuations over 20 days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.10 for any 3-year window where INDPRO rises and HOUST falls.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals economic contraction, reducing consumer spending and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns remain positive in > 40% of periods when PAYEMS shows negative momentum.
